revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-6-115

Alternative term: Climbing shutter

Vertical shuttering to a construction which is self-supporting from the previous part of the construction, and is raised as construction proceeds.

{{IALAFooter}}
